title: Native Android text sharing to particular app in Unity
summary: This particular script will help you to implement native Android text sharing to a particular app in Unity. We use all the native classes of Android in Unity using AndroidJavaClass and AndroidJavaObject and perform the Android’s ACTION_SEND with EXTRA_SUBJECT and EXTRA_TEXT , and share the content to a particular app with package name.
content:
This particular script will help you to implement native Android text sharing to a particular app in Unity.

We use all the native classes of Android in Unity using AndroidJavaClass and AndroidJavaObject and perform the Android’s ACTION_SEND with EXTRA_SUBJECT and EXTRA_TEXT, and share the content to a particular app with package name.
